queries.question: For all guest houses list all of the available suite types.
queries.sql: select guesthouses.housename , suites.suitetype from GuestHouseSuites join Suites on GuestHouseSuites.suiteType = Suites.suiteType join GuestHouses on GuestHouseSuites.guesthouseID = GuestHouses.houseID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?housename ?suitetype WHERE {
  ?guesthousesuites a :GuestHouseSuites .
  ?suites a :Suites .
  ?guesthousesuites p:hasSuites ?suites .
  ?guesthouses a :GuestHouses .
  ?guesthousesuites p:hasGuestHouses ?guesthouses .
  ?guesthouses p:houseName ?housename .
  ?suites p:suiteType ?suitetype .
}

queries.question: What suite types are there for all guest houses?
queries.sql: SELECT Suites.suiteType  from GuestHouseSuites join Suites on GuestHouseSuites.suiteType = Suites.suiteType join GuestHouses on GuestHouseSuites.guesthouseID = GuestHouses.houseID   GROUP BY GuestHouseSuites.suiteType HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT GuestHouseSuites.guesthouseID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  GuestHouses)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What suite types are there for all guest houses?
